description: 1. 100% cotton2. Eye catching graphicsThese trendy t-shirts from reebok sport a unique graphic design that is difficult to find anywhere else! Pair them with torn jeans or three quarter pants, both spell out "style" in a colourful way! Look around and name the one dress that's constant everywhere. The answer is easy - t-shirts. Nothing quite like it. And nothing else will be. Supremely comfortable and so easy to wear, a t-shirt is a sheer delight. Its rather easy to try on a hundred T-shirts and never get tired of even one. Somehow T-shirts have the knack of pleasing the body, senses and soul. They are available in eye-catching colours, great designs, fits and sizes. No matter what the occasion, be it to office, outings or parties, T-shirts are a perfect wear and complement your style effortlessly. Go on and get your T-shirts right away. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18"
